title: wedelia ovalifolia
intro: Wedelia ovalifolia, also known as the Mexican daisy or buttercup, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Mexico and Central America. The medicinal properties of Wedelia ovalifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and lower blood sugar levels. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Wedelia ovalifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
